description: Read non-secret config and environment-backed secret availability.
Check token/chat id exist externally; never log values.
Require allowed_digest/event_detected or explicit manual confirmation.
Apply dedup, cooldown and daily caps.
Allow only study/manual with explicit config.
Split messages into allowed_to_send and blocked_to_send.
Future implementation sends only allowed messages.
Record every gate decision and future sender result.
